nasb.text: And you shall be circumcised in the flesh of your foreskin, and it shall be the sign of the covenant between Me and you.

esv.text: You shall be circumcised in the flesh of your foreskins, and it shall be a sign of the covenant between me and you.

cnv.text: 你們都要割去身上的包皮，這就是我與你們立約的記號了。

ccb.text: 你们都要割包皮，作为我与你们立约的记号。

csbs.text: 你们要割去肉体上的包皮，这就是我与你们立约的标记。
